description:
## Component: hx-toggle-button (NEW)
**Tier 2 — Standard Enterprise | Industry Consensus: 3/6 libraries**

Button with pressed/unpressed toggle state. For toolbar toggles and view switches.

### ADR-001 Classification: Property-Driven (Atomic)

### API Design
**Properties:** `pressed` (boolean), `variant`, `hx-size`, `disabled`, `name`, `value`
**Slots:** Default (label), `prefix`, `suffix`
**CSS Parts:** `button`
**Events:** `hx-toggle` (composed: true, detail: { pressed })

### Drupal Integration
```twig
<hx-toggle-button name="view_mode" value="grid" {% if view == 'grid' %}pressed{% endif %}>
  <hx-icon slot="prefix" name="grid"></hx-icon>
  Grid View
</hx-toggle-button>
```

### Healthcare: View mode toggles, filter toggles, notification preferences
### ElementInternals: Submits value when pressed

### Acceptance Criteria
1. Visual pressed state distinct from unpressed
2. aria-pressed attribute
3. Keyboard: Space/Enter toggles
4. ElementInternals form participation
title: T2-29: hx-toggle-button — Pressed/Unpressed State

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

Inline comments:
In
`@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-toggle-button/hx-toggle-button.stories.ts`:
- Around line 10-101: Remove the unused SVG template variables or use them in
the story so lint stops failing: either delete the declarations for iconGrid,
iconList, iconFilter, iconStar, and iconChevronDown, or reference them in the
hx-toggle-button.stories usage (e.g., include the variables in story templates
or args where icons are demonstrated). Ensure no other references remain to
these identifiers after removal and run the linter to confirm the
unused-variable error is resolved.
- Around line 1-2: The shared render function in hx-toggle-button.stories.ts
isn't binding the exposed argTypes "name" and "value", so Storybook controls
have no effect; update the render function (the exported render used by the
stories) to accept args and inject args.name and args.value into the template
(e.g., include name="${args.name}" and value="${args.value}" or use property
binding .name=${args.name}/.value=${args.value} depending on the component API)
and ensure each story uses that render and passes its args through.
- Around line 216-1014: The story play functions currently use non-null
assertions (e.g., hxToggleButton!, innerButton!, activeToggle!, resetButton!)
which violate strict TS rules; replace them with explicit runtime null checks
and guarded control flow: for each play block (symbols: ToggleInteraction.play,
KeyboardActivation.play, FormParticipation.play, DisabledNoEvent.play, and the
earlier single-click play), retrieve elements into nullable-typed locals
(hxToggleButton, innerButton, activeToggle, resetButton, etc.), assert existence
with if (!element) { throw new Error(...) } or return early so subsequent code
can safely use the variables without !, and simi
